title: citrus paratangerina
intro: Citrus paratangerina, also known as the yuzu or yuja, is a species of citrus plant that belongs to the Rutaceae family. This plant is widely used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Citrus paratangerina include reducing stress and anxiety, improving digestion, and boosting the immune system, making it a popular ingredient in herbal remedies. The plant is often prepared in various herbal preparations, such as tea, essential oil, and infusions, which can be used to treat a range of health issues, from colds and flu to skin conditions and digestive problems.
